summary: Strong soundboard recording with minor tape hiss and a solid show highlighted by Let It Grow and the Give It A Whirl > Forever Grateful > Forever Dead sequence.
review: The performance is well‑played throughout, with a particularly sweet second set and standout moments like a splendid “Let It Grow” and an exciting “Give It A Whirl > Forever Grateful > Forever Dead” run. Charlie’s remaster provides clear soundboard quality, only marred by a faint tape hiss in the quiet passages. Overall the show is solid and enjoyable for any Deadhead.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments on both musical performance (solid, sweet second set, standout songs) and recording quality (nice remaster, minor hiss), with 3 detailed reviews supporting the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice sounding remaster; slight tape hiss in quiet parts; soundboard quirks noted but not intrusive.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Sweet second set praised; solid overall show with an interesting placement of “Don't Ease”; nothing overly crazy but consistently enjoyable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Present for the entire show and positively noted.
band_member_comments.Phil: Present for the entire show and positively noted.
band_member_comments.Bob: Present for the entire show and positively noted.
